description: Myco boot and senescence rituals. See docs/architecture/L1_CONTRACT/protocol.md for R1 and R2. The Agent runs these automatically; humans never invoke them directly. Uses `python -m myco` so dispatch goes through sys.path (immune to stale `myco` consoles on PATH). Three events: SessionStart runs hunger; PreCompact runs the full senesce (assimilate + immune --fix), which blocks until done; SessionEnd (the Claude Code hook, not the deprecated verb alias) runs senesce --quick (assimilate only), staying inside Claude Code's ~1.5s SessionEnd kill budget. `senesce` is the v0.5.3 canonical verb name; `session-end` still resolves as a deprecated verb alias for v0.5.x cached installs.
